neighbors.name: Robert N. Jones et al.
neighbors.claims: Robert N. Jones (with unspecified co-owners, noted as "et al.") appears as a landowner in Cochise County’s parcel records ([Cochise County Treasurer](https://parcelinquirytreasurer.cochise.az.gov/Main/ParcelEntry)). No evidence was found of Jones participating in local civic affairs or making public comments on development issues in Cochise County ([Cochise County Records Archive](https://cochise.az.gov/Archive.aspx)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Use direct, personal outreach (e.g., a friendly in-person visit or letter), as he has no known affiliations or public stance to leverage.

citations.claim: Robert N. Jones appears as a landowner in Cochise County’s parcel records
citations.title: Cochise County Treasurer – Parcel Inquiry

citations.claim: No evidence was found of Jones participating in local civic affairs
citations.title: Cochise County Records Archive

neighbors.verification_notes: Could not verify specific stance. Search results for 'Robert N. Jones' and 'solar' in Cochise County yielded no direct matches; results for 'Jones County' in other states were excluded as irrelevant.

neighbors.name: Ricktor K. Meldrum & Tawneen M. Meldrum
neighbors.claims: Ricktor K. Meldrum and Tawneen M. Meldrum are listed as co-owners of a Cochise County parcel, but their mailing address is outside the area (Logan, Utah) ([National Public Data](https://nationalpublicdata.com/people/m/tawneen-meldrum/)). There are no public records or local news reports indicating the Meldrums’ involvement in Cochise County community matters or any stated position on development ([Cochise County Records Archive](https://cochise.az.gov/Archive.aspx)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out via phone or email with clear project information, as they reside out-of-state. Emphasize straightforward facts and any financial or land-use details that might concern an absentee owner.

citations.claim: Mailing address is outside the area (Logan, Utah)
citations.title: National Public Data - Tawneen M Meldrum

citations.claim: No public records indicating involvement in Cochise County community matters
citations.title: Cochise County Records Archive

neighbors.verification_notes: Confirmed absentee status via public data records linking Tawneen Meldrum to Logan, UT. Original citation to AirportGuide was replaced with a more direct residency record.

neighbors.name: State of Arizona
neighbors.claims: This parcel is owned by the State of Arizona, managed as State Trust Land by the Arizona State Land Department ([ASLD](https://land.az.gov/our-agency-mission/history-trust-land)). The Department has a fiduciary obligation to maximize revenue from the trust, often through leasing for uses including renewable energy ([Sonoran Institute](https://sonoraninstitute.org/files/pdf/strategies-for-renewable-energy-projects-on-arizonas-state-trust-lands-01202011.pdf)). As public land, it is not associated with a private resident and has no individual neighbor stance.

approach_recommendations.engage: Not applicable for private outreach—coordinate with the appropriate state agency through formal channels if required.

citations.claim: Managed as State Trust Land by the Arizona State Land Department
citations.title: Arizona State Land Dept. History

citations.claim: Fiduciary obligation to maximize revenue... including renewable energy
citations.title: Strategies for Renewable Energy Projects on Arizona's State Trust Lands

neighbors.verification_notes: Confirmed State Trust Land status. ASLD generally leases for solar but has no specific 'neighbor' stance on adjacent private projects.

neighbors.name: Military Brothers Moving LLC
neighbors.claims: Military Brothers Moving LLC is a moving services company based in Huachuca City, Arizona, founded by brothers Kevin and Bryan Hoey ([Great Guys Move](https://www.greatguysmove.com/companies/arizona/huachuca-city/military-brothers-moving-llc/)). The company office is located at 1301 N Cochise Ave ([FMCSA](https://safer.fmcsa.dot.gov/query.asp?query_type=queryCarrierSnapshot&query_param=USDOT&query_string=2918139)). No public statements by the owners regarding local development have been documented.

approach_recommendations.engage: Schedule a meeting with the business owners to discuss the project and ensure it won’t disrupt their operations, addressing any concerns about traffic or access.

citations.claim: Founded by brothers Kevin and Bryan Hoey
citations.title: Great Guys Move - Military Brothers Moving LLC Review

citations.claim: Company office is located at 1301 N Cochise Ave
citations.title: FMCSA Safety Records - Military Brothers Moving LLC

neighbors.verification_notes: Identified business owners Kevin and Bryan Hoey. No public stance found.
